candidate_definition_hints.text: Windows Runtime projection for React Native for Windows

React Native WinRT is a module for [React Native for Windows](https://microsoft.github.io/react-native-windows/) developers who want to call native (non-XAML) WinRT APIs in their apps. It uses components from [xlang](https://github.com/Microsoft/xlang) to [parse metadata](https:…
